meta.title: Jaani Francis Nickolas | Technical Product Owner
meta.description: Technical Product Owner with 10+ years in enterprise aviation, cloud platforms, and software delivery.

summary: Technical Product Owner with 10+ years in enterprise aviation, delivering high-quality software through strong technical expertise and modern infrastructure. Skilled at aligning business objectives with cloud-driven solutions while leading teams and managing stakeholders for timely, compliant delivery.

experience.title: Technical Product Owner
highlights: Defined and executed the vision and roadmap for Jetstar's Internal Developer Platform and Unified Infrastructure initiatives, standardising platform capabilities and accelerating infrastructure onboarding across teams.
Led cloud migration efforts, ensuring seamless integration with parent organisation systems and full PCI compliance.
Reported progress and key metrics to senior management and stakeholders, enabling data-driven decision-making and continuous improvement.
Led quarterly planning and initiative scoping sessions using Jira, Confluence, and Miro, ensuring strong stakeholder alignment and clear delivery expectations.
Developed the Platform Team Engagement Guide to enhance cross-team collaboration, streamline onboarding, and support automation-driven workflows.
Maintained healthy backlog management and team wellbeing, resulting in increased deployment cadence, improved sprint predictability, and consistent delivery quality.

experience.title: Cloud Engineer
highlights: Governed and optimised AWS workloads within unified infrastructure, focusing on scalability, performance, and cost efficiency.
Led CI/CD migration from GoCD to GitHub Actions, standardising pipelines with reusable templates.
Designed and managed Akamai CDN configurations including WAF, Bot Manager, and edge property management to improve security and performance.
Implemented observability frameworks using CloudWatch, Splunk, and Datadog, enabling proactive incident detection and faster resolution.
Supported feature teams with robust operational models and handled critical incident management, including CrowdStrike security events.

experience.title: Senior Software Developer
highlights: Developed and maintained mobile backend services and DevOps pipelines using C#, SOAP and REST APIs, Jenkins, AWS CloudFormation, and CI/CD best practices.
Built Jetstar's microservices-based modular distribution platform from the ground up using REST APIs.
Partnered with operations to implement proactive monitoring and alerting, reducing downtime and improving service reliability.

experience.title: Application Developer
highlights: Identified UI/UX gaps and introduced Atomic Design methodology while building Thoughtworks.com, improving frontend consistency and maintainability.
Developed .NET based systems in C# with CI/CD pipelines in GoCD for airline reservation solutions (dotRez).
Delivered applications using Java and MongoDB for healthcare solutions and contributed to iOS app development in Objective-C.

education.degree: Master of Technology (M. Tech) in Information Technology
Bachelor of Technology (B. Tech) in Computer Science

recommendations.name: Engineering Stakeholder
recommendations.quote: Jaani consistently bridges business priorities and delivery execution. He brings calm structure to complex cross-team initiatives and drives outcomes without compromising quality.

recommendations.name: Delivery Partner
recommendations.quote: He creates clarity for engineers through strong roadmap planning and practical technical decisions, helping teams ship faster and more reliably.

highlights: Modular FastAPI backend with endpoints for time, weather, rates, and news
Country-aware geocoding fallbacks for improved accuracy
Local developer workflow with scripts
Lightweight location-aware dashboard
Automatic news refresh synced with weather
Optimized with client-side caching
